certificate.caveat: No assurance of the minimum strength of generated SSPs (e.g., keys).
certificate.description: The ALE Cryptographic Module v3 is a general-purpose cryptographic library incorporated into the OmniSwitch devices and other ALE products to provide FIPS 140-3 validated cryptography for the protection of sensitive information.
